description: Hinglish battery complaint with paisa vasool markers
review_text: Yaar ye product bahut kharab hai. Paisa vasool nahi hua bilkul. Battery sirf 2 ghante chali aur phir band ho gayi. Waste of money ekdum.
notes: Hinglish with paisa vasool, ekdum, yaar markers — reply should also be in Hinglish
